name: Zucchini Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with salt and pepper in a medium bowl.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons butter with olive oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
3. Add onions to the skillet and sauté until lightly browned.
4. Add zucchini, parsley, and garlic; cook until the vegetables are lightly browned.
5. Remove the zucchini using a slotted spoon and stir it into the egg mixture.
6. Melt the remaining butter in the skillet over medium heat.
7. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes on one side, or until the bottom of the frittata is browned.
8. Place a large plate over the frittata and gently press down. Cook for an additional 5-6 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
